title: PDGC-2026
content: PDGC-2026 main 2026 Ninth International Conference on Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing (PDGC-2026) 19-21 November, 2026 Department of Computer Science & Engineering and Information Technology Jaypee University of Information Technology ............... ............... PDGC Home PDGC-2026 Home Committees Technical Program Committee Important Dates Call for Papers Special Sessions Paper Submission Camera Ready Submission Programs Schedule Keynote Speakers Registration Downloads Sponsorship Opportunities Contact Special Sessions To be updated... Call For Special Sessions 2026 Ninth International Conference on Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing (PDGC) will be organized at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan, Himachal Pradesh, India. The PDGC conference has been held biannually since 2010. The conference gathers more than 400 attendees every year including delegates from academia, undergraduate, graduate and PhD students, researchers, and professionals from the industry with different technology backgrounds. PDGC-2026 conference is proposed as a catalyst to promote interactions between industry and academia. A wide spectrum of research results will be presented, with potential practical applications in current industrial technology, as well as industry and application-driven developments. PDGC-2026 conference invites the authors to electronically submit their paper using IEEE format written in English, of up to 6 pages (Full Paper) and 4 pages (Short Paper), full paper presenting the results of original research or innovative and short paper may have partially completed with theoretically established idea to practical applications relevant to the conference. All submissions are to be done electronically using Microsoft Conference Management Toolkit portal and all accepted and presented papers will be sent to IEEE Xplore for their further possible publication and indexing with various database like ACM Digital Library, DBLP, Compendex, ScienceDirect, Scopus, Google Scholar, INSPEC, JournalTOCs, CiteSeerX, Web of Science, Journal Citation Report(JCR), and ERIC etc. The Conference focuses on all aspects related to research, development, and applications of Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing. A non-exhaustive list of topics of interest for the PDGC-2026 conference is mentioned at the home page of the conference: http://www.juit.ac.in/pdgc-2026/index1.php. Special Session proposals are solicited on topics listed above or on others Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing related areas. The Special Sessions proposals have to be submitted to the Conference Committee by email pdgc2026@juitsolan.in in the prescribed format. TECHNICAL SPONSOR To be updated.. FINANCIAL SPONSORS SUPPORTERS JUIT IEEE STUDENT BRANCH CONTACT US For information to all, that official email of PDGC-2026 is pdgc2026@juitsolan.in PDGC-2026, juit.ac.in
